use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MOTOR FLUCTUATIONS IN ADULTS WITH ADVANCED PARKINSON'S DISEASE

indications.text:
VYALEV is indicated for the treatment of motor fluctuations in adults with advanced
Parkinson’s disease (PD).
